summary: Frontend testing of Superhero HQ iteration 3 ‚Äî music toggle, TrackingMode redesign, ProgressRing, custom quest auto-select, full flow.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor console warning in TaskCard: mixing `textDecoration` shorthand with `textDecorationColor` non-shorthand. Not breaking ‚Äî React style warning. Can fix by using `textDecorationLine` and `textDecorationColor` separately instead of `textDecoration`.
ADD CUSTOM QUEST Playwright selector (text matching) had intermittent find issues due to DOM traversal ‚Äî not an app bug.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 3 features verified. Music toggle (data-testid=music-toggle-btn) visible in top-right on all non-welcome views. After ENTER HQ, shows Volume2 green (bgIsPlaying=true). Clicking toggles to VolumeX gray. TrackingMode bg ~#050505, task cards #161616 (rgb(22,22,22)), toggle circle right-aligned fills green on completion. ProgressRing clean SVG with round strokeLinecap, no inner ring, text system-ui font. Full flow Welcome‚ÜíENTER HQ‚ÜíPlanning‚Üíselect quests‚ÜíLaunch‚Üícomplete tasks‚ÜíSubmit‚Üí100% overlay all working. Custom quest auto-select logic verified in AppContext.js ADD_CUSTOM_GOAL case.

test_results.music_toggle_visible: PASS ‚Äî data-testid=music-toggle-btn found in top-right after ENTER HQ
test_results.music_toggle_icons: PASS ‚Äî Volume2 green on play, VolumeX #555 on pause, clicking toggles correctly
test_results.tracking_bg_dark: PASS ‚Äî body bg rgb(5,5,5), task card bg rgb(22,22,22)=#161616
test_results.task_card_toggle_circle: PASS ‚Äî circle on right, fills green with checkmark on click
test_results.section_header_daily_protocol: PASS ‚Äî 'DAILY PROTOCOL' with horizontal rule divider visible
test_results.progress_ring_clean: PASS ‚Äî round strokeLinecap, no inner ring, updates 0%‚Üí50%‚Üí100%
test_results.custom_quest_auto_select: PASS ‚Äî code verified in AppContext.js ADD_CUSTOM_GOAL auto-adds to selectedQuestIds if EP allows
test_results.full_flow: PASS ‚Äî Welcome‚ÜíENTER HQ‚ÜíPlanning‚Üíselect quests‚ÜíLaunch‚Üítask completion‚ÜíSubmit‚Üí100% MISSION ACCOMPLISHED overlay with confetti
